title: Caldera - Exfiltration to Web Service from Windows Endpoint
description: Detects uploads of collected data to public web services from Windows hosts. Caldera T1567 emulation uses PowerShell or curl to push staged files to paste sites, anonymous file-share services, or cloud storage APIs. This complements the OneDrive-specific BLUELIGHT APT rule with a general cross-service detection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( (('Command Line' like '*pastebin.com*' or 'Command Line' like '*paste.ee*' or 'Command Line' like '*transfer.sh*' or 'Command Line' like '*file.io*' or 'Command Line' like '*ix.io*' or 'Command Line' like '*0x0.st*')) or (('Command Line' like '*s3.amazonaws.com*' or 'Command Line' like '*storage.googleapis.com*' or 'Command Line' like '*blob.core.windows.net*' or 'Command Line' like '*objectstorage.oraclecloud.com*')) ) and (('Command Line' like '*Invoke-WebRequest*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-RestMethod*' or 'Command Line' like '*curl.exe*' or 'Command Line' like '*wget.exe*')))
falsepositives: Authorized DevOps pipelines deploying to cloud storage
